name: Traws Pharma, Inc.
summary: Overview Traws Pharma, Inc. (Traws, we, or the Company) is a clinical stage biopharmaceutical company dedicated to developing novel therapies to target critical threats to human health in respiratory viral diseases. We are advancing novel investigational antiviral agents that have potent activity against difficult to treat or resistant virus strains that threaten human health.
